requiredFindings.summary: The patch special-cases one adjacent-parameter pattern but does not remove the broader overlapping-capture risk.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Routes such as /:a-:b-:c or custom captures can still generate regexes that block the Node event loop on long inputs.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Fix the compiler so generated captures have unambiguous boundaries for all adjacent parameters, or upgrade to a safe version.

requiredFindings.summary: The test covers only one two-parameter route.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: The same ReDoS class can survive in three-segment and custom-capture routes.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Add timed regression tests for multiple adjacent params, custom patterns, and long non-matching inputs.
